title: Support nested interface as port connection (#5066)

features.name: nested interface member as submodule port connection
features.description: Code should include a module instantiating a handler submodule with a nested interface member passed as port connection, where an outer interface contains a nested interface instance

features.name: interface port receiving nested sub-interface for child connection
features.description: Code should include a module that receives an interface port and passes the port's nested sub-interface to child submodules

features.name: parameterized nested interface with passthrough parameters
features.description: Code should include a nested interface hierarchy where inner interfaces pass through parameters from outer interfaces

features.name: type parameter in nested interface hierarchy
features.description: Code should include a nested interface hierarchy using parameter type T instead of integer widths
